strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP frameworks
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) vs. candidate name (Aisha Okonkwo)
No explicit mention of Master's/PhD in AI or formal AI research publications
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates deep, hands-on engineering expertise in AI-agent systems, cloud infrastructure, and scalable platforms, with strong open-source leadership and full-stack fluency — aligning closely with the role’s technical demands. However, the name discrepancy raises red flags about resume authenticity, and while AI experience is present, it lacks formal academic credentials or documented strategic customer advisory work, which are preferred qualifications.
